title: Industrialized Alchemy Steampunk
description: The Fourth Installment of Industrialized Alchemy Series.
body:
The Fourth installment to the Industrialized Alchemy Mod Suite Series,
IA Steampunk features classic tech and automation methods with a new spin on energy via Steam!
Made for Minecraft 1.12.2, this mod features:
*Ultra-lightweight mechanics optimized for performance.
*A full suite of custom machine blocks that process resources.
*New Tools & Items providing significant QOL to the vanilla experience.
*A New Deep generation resource in the world that will manifest new item transmutations.
This is IA's most lightweight mod yet, accenuating simplicity without the cost of industrialization fun.
Once again End Portals are craftable to challenge the Ender Dragon now to a steampunk style clash.

Blocks Include:
Steam Boiler
Steam Turbines
Steam Superheater
Centrifuge
Magnetizer
Smithing Table (redefined)
Compressor
Rod Blazer
Energy Pipe (Item energy, No RF)
Alloy Fuser
XP Booster
Arboreum
Water Pump
Grinder
Output Extractor
Hypercooler
Solar Heater
Disenchanter (Disenchants items for xp and transfer enchantments to books)
Acid Leacher
Transmutator (Transforms metals and materials)
CubeCart (Purchase Materials with Emeralds)
CubeEstate (Purchase Structures with Gold, See Screenshots)

Items/Resources/ Include:
Steam
Energy
Magnetite
Lead
Quartz
Chromium
Carnotite
Pitchblende
Uranium
Radium
Basalt
Hematite
Silica/Silicon
Silicon Carbdide
Zircon
Soda/Potash
Ferric Oxide
Mushroom Blocks
IA Steampunk Manual


Toolsets Include:
Magnetite, Redstone, Lapis, Radium
Misc Tools Include:
Smithing Hammer, Silky Pickaxe, Lava Sponge, Radium Drill/Wand/Compass

Bricks Building Blocks Set:
Mud Bricks.
Sandstone Bricks
Snow Bricks
Iron Bricks
Lead Bricks
Gold Bricks
Lapis Bricks
Gilded Lapis Bricks
Gilded Gold Bricks
Gilded Redstone Bricks
Gilded Magnetite Bricks
Redstone Bricks
Diamond Bricks
Chromium Bricks
Uranium Bricks
Radium Bricks

NOTE:
This Mod adds later vanilla blocks not in 1.12.2 including:
Polished Diorite Stairs, Slab & Wall, Sandstone Wall, Cherry Leaves & Sapling (Now Almond Tree), Copper blocks. Tinted Glass.

This Mod is currently Updatable/Expandable and Bug-Fixable. All feedback is considered and appreciated.
Made with love by Temutsaj in west coast USA.

This project is public domain. You may use, modify, redistribute, or incorporate it into any work, including commercial, without permission or credit. It is for the Minecraft community, but please give credit if you wish.
